translations.hypothesis: यद्यपि, महामारीले धेरै स्वास्थ्य-संबंधित मापदण्डहरूले अझमा बिच, र उच्च-गुणवत्ताको स्वास्थ्य सेवा, नियमित इम्युनाइजेसन र आर्थिक सुरक्षामा असमानता, योगदान गरेको छ। फलस्वरूप, मलेरिया र टीबीमा सुधारको प्रवृत्ति उल्टाउन भयो, र धेरै मानिसहरूले उपेक्षित उष्णकटिबंधीय रोगहरू (NTDs) का उपचार नलिए। "जागतिक स्वास्थ्य तथ्याङ्क" ले विश्वको स्वास्थ्य अवस्थाको वार्षिक मूल्याङ्कन हो। रिपोर्टले गैर-संक्रामक रोगहरूको खतरामा स्पष्ट सन्देश दिन्छ, जुन जीवन, आजीविका, स्वास्थ्य प्रणाली, समुदाय, अर्थव्यवस्था र समाजहरूमा भारी र क्रमिक प्रभाव पार्छ," भन्यो डा. टेड्रोस अधानोम गेब्रेयसस, WHO निर्देशक-सामान्य। "रिपोर्टले स्थायी विकास लक्ष्यहरूमा फर्किन, स्वास्थ्य र स्वास्थ्य प्रणालीमा पर्याप्त लगानी वृद्धि गर्न आह्वान गर्दछ।" गैर-संक्रामक रोगहरू - भविष्यका पुस्ताहरूको लगातार वृद्धि भอยो। समग्र स्वास्थ्य प्रगतिको बाबजूद, गैर-संक्रामक रोगहरूले निम्त्याउने मृत्युको अनुपात लगातार बढिरहेको छ, र अहिले लगभग तीन चौथाई सबै वार्षिक मृत्युको योगदान गरिरहेको छ। यदि यो प्रवृत्ति जारी रह्यो, गैर-संक्रामक रोगहरूले 2050 को मध्यसम्म 90 मिलियन वार्षिक मृत्युको लगभग 86% प्रतिनिधित्व गर्ने प्रक्षेपित गरिन्छ; फलस्वरूप, 77 मिलियन मध्ये, 90% ले गैर-संक्रामक रोगहरूले निम्त्याउनेछ - 2019 देखि क्रमिक रूपमा 90% ले। स्थिर प्रगतिलाई गति दिन आवश्यक छ। हालका प्रवृत्तियाँले धेरै मापदण्डहरूको वार्षिक कमी दर (ARR) मा कमीको संकेत देखाउँछन्। उदाहरणको लागि, जागतिक मातृक मृत्यु दर 2021 र 2030 बीच 11.6% प्रति वर्ष घट्नुपर्छ, ताकि SDG लक्ष्य पूरा सकियो। समान रूपमा, 2015 देखि 2021 सम्म टीबीको घटनामा शुद्ध कमी, WHO को "End TB Strategy" को 2025 को लक्ष्यसम्मको आधा मात्र थियो।

translations.source: Despite a reduction in exposure to many health risks – such as tobacco use, alcohol consumption, violence, unsafe water and sanitation, and child stunting – progress was inadequate and exposure to some risks such as air pollution remains high. Alarmingly, the prevalence of obesity is rising with no immediate sign of reversal. Furthermore, expanded access to essential health services has slowed compared to pre-2015 gains, coupled with no significant progress in reducing financial hardship due to health-care costs. This drastically limits our ability to achieve Universal Health Coverage by 2030. “The COVID-19 pandemic is an important reminder that progress is neither linear nor guaranteed,” warns Dr Samira Asma, WHO Assistant Director-General for Data, Analytics and Delivery for Impact. “To stay on track towards the 2030 SDG agenda, we must act decisively and collectively to deliver a measurable impact in all countries.” This year’s report includes for the first time a dedicated section on climate change and health, and we anticipate that this will be of more relevance in the report going forward. For this issue and all other areas timely, reliable and disaggregated data are critical to track progress and improve national and global health policies. Editor’s note: The World Health Statistics report is the World Health Organization’s (WHO) annual compilation of the most recent available data on health and health-related indicators. For inquiries, contact [email protected]
translations.reference: Ngaphandle kokwehla ekubonakaleni kwengcuphe yezempilo eningi-njengokusetshenziswa kwagwayi, ukuphuza utshwala, udlame,amanzi angaphephile nokuhlanzeka, okwezingane, ukuqhubeka nokunganeli nokuvuleleka kwezinye izingcuphe njengokungcola komoya kuhlezi kuphezulu. Okuthusayo, ukusabalala kokukhuluphala ngokweqile kuyanyuka kungekho nophawu lokukubuyisela emuva. Ukuqhubekaukwanda kokuthola emisebenzini yezempilo ebalulekile sekwehlile uma uqhathanisa kokuzuza kwaphambili kwa-2015, okuhlanganiswe nokuqhubeka okukhulu ekwehliseni ubunzima kwezezimali ngenxa yokubiza kokunakekelwa kwezempilo. Imikhawulo emikhulu yokukwazi kwethu ukuthola i-Universal Health Coverage ngo-2030. "Ubhubhane lweCOVID-19 luyisikhumbuzo esibalulekile sokuthi ukuqhubeka akuhambi ngolayini noma akuqinisekisiwe," kuxwayisa uDkt Samira Asma, Umsizi woMqondisi Jikele weMininingo kuWHO, ukuhlaziya nokulethwa kwemithelela. "Ukuhlala esimweni okuya kuAjenda yeSDG 2030, kumele sinqume kanhle silethe ngokubambisana kumthelela okaliwe kuwona wonke amazwe." Umbiko wakulonyaka ufaka okokuqala isahluko sokuzinikela kwezokuguquka kwesimo sezulu nezempilo, futhi siyakubona lokhu kuzohlobana embikweni kusuka manje kuya phambili. Ngalenkinga nazo zonke izindawo,ukwethembeka kanye nokungesona isilinganisso solwazi kubucayi ukulandelela ukuqhubeka nokwenza ngcono ezweni nakuzinqubomgomo zezempilo emhlabeni. Inothi lomhleli: iWolrd Health Statistics umbiko yiWolrd Health Organisation (WHO) ukuhlanganisa konyaka kolwazi olukhona lwakamuva kwezempilo kanye nezinkomba ezihlobene nezempilo. Uma unemibuzo xhumana [imeyili ivikelekile]
translations.hypothesis: यद्यपि क्रय जोखिमहरू - जस्तै, धूम्रपान, मद्यपान, हिंसा, असुरक्षित पानी र स्वच्छता, र बालबालको विकास - कम भइरहेको छ, तर प्रगति अद्यागतिक छैन र केही जोखिमहरू, जस्तै वायु प्रदूषण, अझै पनि उच्च छ। चिन्ताजनक रूपमा, लतको दर बढिरहेको छ, र यसको समाधान नभएको छ। थप, आवश्यक स्वास्थ्य सेवाहरूमा पहुँच बढेको छ, तर यसले 2015 अघि हासिल गरिएका प्रगतिमा तुलना गरी, स्वास्थ्य सेवा लागतले निम्त्याउने आर्थिक कठिनाईहरू कम नहुँदा, प्रगति कमजोर भइरहेको छ। यसले 2030 मा सार्वभौमिक स्वास्थ्य सेवा हासिल गर्ने हाम्रो क्षमतालाई निक बेर सीमित गरेको छ. "COVID-19 महामारीले यो सचेतनामा, प्रगति लगातार र निश्चित छैन," चेतावनी दिन्छ डा. सामिरा अस्मा, WHO डेटा, विश्लेषण र प्रभावको लागि सहायक निर्देशक। "2030 SDG एजेंडामा अग्रसर भइरहने, हामीले सबै देशहरूमा मापन योग्य प्रभाव लिन, निर्णायक र सामूहिक रूपमा कार्य गर्न आवश्यक छ।" यस वर्षको रिपोर्टमा, जलवायु परिवर्तन र स्वास्थ्यको बारेमा एक विशेष अनुभाग समावेश गरिएको छ, र हामीले यो भविष्यमा रिपोर्टमा थप प्रासंगिक हुने अपेक्षा गरेका छौँ। यस विषय र अन्य क्षेत्रहरूमा, समयबद्ध, विश्वसनीय र विस्तृत डेटा, प्रगति मापन र राष्ट्रिय र जागतिक स्वास्थ्य नीतिको सुधारको लागि महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। संपादनको नोट: विश्व स्वास्थ्य तथ्याङ्क रिपोर्ट, विश्व स्वास्थ्य सङ्गठन (WHO) ले स्वास्थ्य र स्वास्थ्य-संबंधित संकेतकहरूमा उपलब्ध नवीनतम डेटाको वार्षिक संकलन हो। सोधपुछको लागि, [email protected] मा सम्पर्क गर्नुहोस्।

translations.source: WHO Director-General announces Global Health Leaders Awards Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot awarded for lifelong commitment to health WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus will present two lifetime achievement awards to recognize outstanding contributions to advancing global health during the high-level opening session of the Seventy-sixth World Health Assembly. The Director-General’s Global Leaders Awards, which were established in 2019, will go to Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum and Peter Piot. Both recipients are distinguished scientists and public health leaders who were closely involved in the discovery of Ebola virus disease before advancing to leadership positions in global health. The award honours their lifetime achievements in public health. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum from the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) is being recognized for his innovation, leadership and ground-breaking contributions to the management and treatment of diseases such as Ebola virus disease. He has played a critical role in improving health outcomes in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, the African region, and the global community. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum is the Director General of the DRC’s National Institute of Biomedical Research in Kinshasa, full Professor of Microbiology at the University of Kinshasa Medical School and the inaugural president of the Congolese Academy of Science. Professor Muyembe-Tamfum was part of the team that discovered the Zaïre ebolavirus during the first recorded outbreak in 1976, in Equateur Province, Central DRC.
translations.reference: Umqondisi Jikelele weWHO umemezele Imiklomelo yaBaholi beZempilo eMhlabeni UJean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum noPeter Piot baklonyelwe ngokuzibophezela impilo yabo yonke kwezempilo Umqondisi Jikelele weWHO uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus uzokwethula imiklomelo yempilo yonke emibili ukubona ukunikela okumangazayo ukwenza ngcono ezempilo zomhlaba ngesikhathi seseshini yokuvula esezingeni eliphakeme yoMhlangano weZempilo woMhlaba wamashumi ayisithupha nesithupha. Imiklomelo yaBaholi boMhlaba yaMqondisi Jikelele, eyasungulwa ngo-2019 izoya kuJean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum noPeter Piot. Bobabili abatholile bangosayensi abahlukile futhi bangabaholi bezempilo yomphakathi ababezibandakanye kakhulu ekutholeni isifo segciwane ibhola ngaphambi kokudlulela phambili ngesikhundla kwezobuholi kwezempilo emhlabeni. Umklomelo ubahlonipha ngabakuzuze impilo yabo yonke kwezempilo yomphakathi. USolwazi Muyembe-Tamfum waseDemocratic Republic of Congo (DRC) uyabonwa ngokwenza okusha, ubuholi bakhe nomnikelo omangazayo kuya ekuphatheni nokwelapha izifo ezinjenge sifo segciwane i-Ebola. Usedlale indima ebucayi ekwenzeni ngcono imiphumela yezempilo eDemocratic Republic of Congo, isifunda sase-Afrika kanye nomphakathi wasemhlabeni. USolwazi Muyembe-Tamfum unguMqondisi Jikelele weDRC National Institute of Biomedical Research eKinshasa, uSolwazi ogcwele weMicrobiology eNyuvesi yaseKinshasa Medical School nomongameli wokwethula waseCongolese Academy of Science. USolwazi Muyembe-Tamfum wayeyingxenye yeqembu elathola ukuthi iZaire inegciwane lebhola ngesikhathi kuqoshwa okokuqala ukubheduka ngo-1976 eSifundazweni saseEquateur, Maphakathi neDRC.
translations.hypothesis: अध्यक्ष जेनेरल WHO, Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum र Peter Piot, घोषित गरिन्छ। पुरस्कारको लागि। अध्यक्ष जेनेरल WHO, डा. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, 76-औं विश्व स्वास्थ्य सभाको उच्च-स्तरीय उद्घाटनको दौरान, उत्कृष्ट योगदानहरूलाई मान्यता दिने उद्देश्यले, दुई पुरस्कार प्रस्तुत गर्ने। "ग्लोबल लिडर अवार्ड्स" (2019 मा स्थापित), पुग्नेछ कय Jean-Jacques Muyembe-Tamfum र Peter Piot। दुवै प्राप्तकर्ता हुन्, उत्कृष्ट वैज्ञानिक र सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य नेता, जे आउनमा संलग्न थिए, अग्रे सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य नेतृत्वको भूमिका। यो पुरस्कार, सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्यमा, दुईजनाको जीवनको योगदानलाई सम्मान। प्रोफेसर Muyembe-Tamfum, देखि Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), पहिचान गरिन्छ, उनको नवीनता, नेतृत्व र, जस्तै, Ebola virus disease, को व्यवस्थापन र उपचारमा, महत्त्वपूर्ण योगदान। उनी, Democratic Republic of the Congo, अफ्रिकन क्षेत्र र, विश्व समुदायमा, स्वास्थ्यको सुधारमा, महत्त्वपूर्ण भूमिका खेलेको छ। प्रोफेसर Muyembe-Tamfum, DRC, नेशनल इन्स्टिच्युट अफ बायोमेडिकल रिसर्च, च्यान्सा, पूर्ण प्रोफेसर, माइक्रोबायोलजी, च्यान्सा मेडिकल स्कूल र, Congolese Academy of Science, पहिलो अध्यक्ष। प्रोफेसर Muyembe-Tamfum, 1976 मा, Equateur Province, Central DRC, पहिलो रेकर्डित प्रकोप, Zaïre ebolavirus, खोजेको टीमको सदस्य।

translations.source: He later helped design one of the first effective treatments against the virus and the deployment of experimental Ebola virus disease vaccines. He has worked tirelessly to build the Democratic Republic of the Congo’s scientific capacity, establishing multiple research facilities in the country, and has played key roles with WHO in fighting infectious diseases. Professor Piot from Belgium is being recognized for his extraordinary leadership in the response to the HIV/AIDS epidemic and other significant global health challenges. He has played a vital role in launching major global health initiatives such as UNAIDS, the Global Fund, and others that have improved health outcomes around the world. Under his leadership, UNAIDS became the chief advocate for worldwide action against AIDS, also spearheading UN reform by bringing together 10 different UN organizations. Professor Piot also played a part in the earlier discovery of the Ebola virus, and the containment of the first known outbreak, participating in field epidemiological investigations. He has chaired a number of high-level initiatives, served in numerous high-level advisory roles, including on COVID-19, and has received multiple awards. Professor Piot is the Special Advisor to the EC President, a Professor of Global Health and former Director of the London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine. “These outstanding individuals embody lifelong dedication, relentless advocacy, a commitment to equity, and selfless service of humanity and people’s health,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “In a time of multiple emergencies, health crises, and conflict, we recognize that leadership in public health and science are more important than ever to advance global health.
translations.reference: Makhathaleni waseza ukwakha omunye wemishanguzo youqala esebenzayo ekulweni negciwane nokufakwa kokuhlolwa kwemigomo yesifo segciwane i-Ebola. Usesebenza ngokungakhathali ukwakha iDemocratic Republic of the Congo emandleni esayensi, ukwakha izindawo zokwenza ucwaningo oluningi ezweni, usedlale indima ebaluleke kakhulu neWHO ekulweni nezifo ezithelelanayo. USolwazi Piot waseBelgium uyabonakala ngobuholi obuhle kakhulu ekuphenduleni ngobhubhane lweHIV/AIDS kanye nezinye izingqinamba ezibalulekile zezempilo emhlabeni. Usedlale indima ebaluleke kakhulu ekwethulweni kwemizamo emikhulu yezempilo emhlabeni njenge-UNAIDS, iGlobal Fund, kanye neminye esiyenze ngcono imiphumela yezempilo emhlabeni wonke. Ngaphansi kobuholi bakhe, i-UNAIDS ibe ngabameli abakhulu emhlabeni wonke bokwenza okubhekene neAIDS kanye nokukhomba indlela ekwenzeni busha i-UN ngokuhlanganisa ndawonye izinhlangano ezahlukene ezingu-10 ze-UN. USolwazi Piot ube yingxenye futhi yokusheshe kutholakale igciwane i-Ebola, nokulilawula ngesikhathi libheduka okokuqala lingaziwa, ukubamba iqhaza ekwenzeni ucwaningo ngezobhubhane. Usebe ngusihlalo wemizamo eminingi esezingeni eliphezulu,wasebenza emazingeni aphezulu amaningi njengomeluleki, okufaka nakuCOVID-19 usethole imiklomelo eminingi. USolwazi Piot unguMeluleki okhethekile kuMongameli wase-EC, uSolwazi weZempilo yoMhlaba owayenguMqondisi weLondon School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine. "Laba bantu abahlabahlosile banokuzinikela impilo yonke, ukumela, ukuzibophezela ekulinganeni, ukusebenzela abantu kanye nezempilo zabantu," kusho uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO, uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. "Ngesikhathi sokuphuthumayo okuningi,izinkinga zezempilo nokuxabana,siyabubona ubuholi kwezempilo yomphakathi nesayensi kubaluleke kakhulu ukwenzangcono ezempilo emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis: यद्यपि, पछि, उनले मद्दत गरे डिजाइन गर्न एउटा पहिलो प्रभावकारी उपचार विरुद्ध, र प्रयोगिक इबोला भाइरस रोग खोपहरूको कार्यान्वयन। उनले अथक परिश्रम गरेका छन्, निर्माण वैज्ञानिक क्षमताको रिपब्लिक डेमोक्रेटिक कोन्गो, स्थापना बहुविध अनुसन्धान प्रतिष्ठानहरू, र WHO मा, लडिरहेको संक्रामक रोगहरू। प्रोफेसर पियोट, देखि बेल्जियम, आउन पहिचान गरिन्छ, उनको असाधारण नेतृत्व, प्रतिक्रियामा एचआईभी/एआईडीएस प्रकोप र अन्य महत्त्वपूर्ण विश्वव्यापी स्वास्थ्य चुनौतीहरू। उनले महत्त्वपूर्ण विश्वव्यापी स्वास्थ्य पहविधिहरू, जस्तै UNAIDS, The Global Fund, र अन्य, कार्यान्वयनमा महत्त्वपूर्ण भूमिका खेलेको छ, जसले विश्वव्यापी रूपमा स्वास्थ्य परिणामहरू सुधार गरेको छ। उनको नेतृत्वमा, UNAIDS बनेको मुख्य वकालतकर्ता विरुद्ध एआईडीएस, साथै UN सुधार, 10 विभिन्न UN सङ्गठनहरूलाई भेला। प्रोफेसर पियोटले पनि, इबोला भाइरसको प्रारम्भिक खोज, र पहिलो ज्ञात प्रकोप नियन्त्रणमा, क्षेत्रको महामारीको अनुसन्धानमा भाग लिन। उनले, विभिन्न उच्च-स्तरीय पहविधिहरू, विभिन्न उच्च-स्तरीय सल्लाहकारी भूमिकामा सेवा, सहित COVID-19, र धेरै पुरस्कारहरू प्राप्त गरेको छ। प्रोफेसर पियोट, EC राष्ट्रपति, विश्वव्यापी स्वास्थ्य, र लन्डन स्कूल अफ हाइजिन एन्ड ट्रोपिकल मेडिसिनका पूर्व निर्देशक। "यी उत्कृष्ट व्यक्ति, जीवन भरको समर्पण, अथक वकालत, समानताको प्रतिबद्धता, र मानव र मानिसको स्वास्थ्यको निःस्वार्थ सेवा," भन्यो WHO निर्देशक-सामान्य, डा. टेड्रोस एधानोम गेब्रेयसस। "एकाधिक आपत्क, स्वास्थ्य संकट, र संघर्षको समयमा, हामीले पहिचान गरेका छौ, सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य र विज्ञानमा नेतृत्व, विश्वव्यापी स्वास्थ्यको विकासमा थप महत्त्वपूर्ण छ।"

translations.source: Our awardees today personify that passion.” “Their combined stories and successes show how much the world has progressed in terms of collaboration at the global, regional and country levels to strengthen health emergency preparedness, response and resilience. These outstanding scientists will continue to inspire us every day,” he added The ceremony for the awards form part of the high-level opening session of the 76th World Health Assembly being held on Sunday 21 May 2023 in Geneva.
translations.reference: Abahlonishwa bethu namhlanje bakhombisa leyo ntshisekelo." "Izindaba zabo behlangene nokuphumelela kukhombisa ukuthi umhlaba usuqhubeke kangakanani ngokokubambisana emhlabeni,esifundeni nasemazingeni ezwe ukuqinisa ukuzilungiselela okuphuthumayo kwezempilo nokuphendula nokubekezela. Amasayensisi agqamile azoqhubeka ukugqugquzela zonke izinsuku," wengezile emcimbini wemiklomelo njengengxenye yeseshini yokuvula esezingeni eliphezulu lesi-76th World Health Assembly ozobanjwa ngesonto mhlaka-21 May 2023 eGeneva.
translations.hypothesis: "लाग्दारिता आज, तिनीहरूले तिनीहरूले।" "तिनीहरूको साझा कथा र सफलताले देखाउँछ कसले जति प्रगति हासिल गरेको छ, जसमा सहयोग, नเฉพาะ विश्व, तर क्षेत्रीय र राष्ट्रिय स्तरमा, स्वास्थ्य अपवाद तयारी, प्रतिक्रिया र लचीलापन बढावा दिन्छ। यी उत्कृष्ट वैज्ञानिक, हरेक दिन, हामीलाई प्रेरित गर्ने।" थप, सोही, सोही

translations.source: WHO congratulates Benin and Mali for eliminating trachoma as a public health problem WHO has validated Benin and Mali as having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem, making them the fifth and sixth countries in WHO’s African Region to achieve this significant milestone. Countries that previously received WHO validation for trachoma elimination are Ghana (June 2018), Gambia (April 2021), Togo (May 2022) and Malawi (September 2022). “WHO congratulates the health authorities of Benin and Mali and their network of global and local partners for these milestones”, said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. “Following Benin’s and Mali’s success, trachoma remains endemic in 23 countries in WHO’s African Region, bringing us a step closer towards the elimination target for trachoma set in the road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030.” Globally, Benin and Mali join 15 other countries that have been validated by WHO for having eliminated trachoma as a public health problem. These are Cambodia, China, the Gambia, Ghana, Islamic Republic of Iran, Lao People’s Democratic Republic, Malawi, Mexico, Morocco, Myanmar, Nepal, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Togo and Vanuatu. Trachoma elimination using WHO’s SAFE strategy Both Benin and Mali implemented the WHO-recommended SAFE strategy to eliminate trachoma with the support of WHO and partners. The SAFE strategy consists of surgery to treat late trachoma complications; antibiotics to clear infection; facial cleanliness; and environmental improvement, particularly improving access to water and sanitation, to reduce transmission.
translations.reference: I-WHO ihalalisela iBenin neMali ngokuqeda isifo samehlo njengenkinga yezempilo yomphakathi I-WHO isiqinisekise iBenin neMali ngokuqda isifo samehlo njengenkinga yezempilo yomphakathi,nokubenza abesihlanu nesithupha amazwe aseAfrika eWHO ukuthola umsebenzi omkhulu kangaka. Amazwe asethole ukugunyazwa okuvela kwiWHO ngokuqeda isifo samehlo yiGhana (ngoNhlangulana 2018) iGambia (ngoMbasa 2021) Togo (ngoNhlaba 2022 kanye neMalawi (ngoMandulo 2022). "WHO ihalalisela abasemagunyeni bezempilo baseBenin neMali kanye nohlelokuxhumana lwabo emhlabeni kanye nababambisani bendawo kulokhu asebekuzuzile," kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO. "Kulandela impumelelo yeBenin neMali isifo samehlo siyaqhubeka siba wubhubhane emazweni angu-23 eWHO African Region, kusiletha eduze kokuqedwa okuhlosiwe okuhleliwe kwesifo samehlo kubalazwe kulezofifo ezijwaelekile ezinganakiwe 2021-2030." Emhlabeni iBenin neMali bazojoyina amanye amazwe angu-15 asegunyazwe yiWHO ngokuqeda isifo samehlo njengenkinga yezempilo yomphakathi. Lawo mazwe yiCambodia, iChina, iGambia, iGhana, i-Islamic Republic of Iran, iLao Peoples Democratic Republic, iMalawi, iMexico, iMorocco, iMyanmar, iNepal, i-Oman, iSaudi Arabia, iTogo neVanuatu. Ukuqeda isifo samehlo usebenzisa isu leSAFE leWHO Womabili amazwe iBenin neMali benze isiphakamiso sesu lokuphepha leWHO ukuqeda isifo samehlo ngokwesekwa yiWHO nababambisani. Isu leSAFE liqukethe ukuhlinzwa ukuze welaphe isifo samehlo ngobunzia,ama-antibhayothikhi ukuqeda ukungcola,izinto zokuhlanza ubuso,ukwenzangcono indawo,ikakhulukazi ukwenza ngcono ukuthola amazi nokuthuthwa kwendle ukwehlisa ukudlulisela.
translations.hypothesis: WHO बधाई दिन्छन बेनिन र मालीको लागि, ले ट्राहोमालाई सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य समस्या हटाउन। WHO ले पुष्टि गरेको छ, बेनिन र मालीले ट्राहोमालाई सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य समस्या हटाउन सफल भएका छन्, र यसले उनीहरूलाई WHO को अफ्रिकन क्षेत्रमा यो महत्त्वपूर्ण उपलब्धि हासिल गर्ने पाँचौ र छौ मुलुक बनाउँछ। मुलुकहरू जुन पहिले ट्राहोमा हटाउनको लागि WHO बाट मान्यता पाए, हुन् Ghana (जून 2018), Gambia (अप्रैल 2021), Togo (मे 2022) र Malawi (सितम्बर 2022). "WHO बधाई दिन्छ बेनिन र मालीका स्वास्थ्य अधिकारीहरू, र उनीहरूको स्थानीय र जागतिक साझेदारहरू, यस उपलब्धिको लागि", भन्यो डा. टेड्रोस एधानोम गेब्रेयसस, WHO निर्देशक-सामान्य। "बेनिन र मालीको सफलतापछि, ट्राहोमा 23 मुलुकहरूमा WHO को अफ्रिकन क्षेत्रमा व्याप्त छ, र यसले हामीलाई ट्राहोमाको उन्मूलनको लक्ष्य, जो 2021-2030 को उपेक्षित उष्णकटिबंधीय रोगहरूको मार्गचित्रमा निर्धारण गरिएको, नजिक ल्याउँछ।" जागतिक स्तरमा, बेनिन र माली सामेल छन्, 15 अन्य मुलुकहरू, जे WHO ले ट्राहोमालाई सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य समस्या हटाउनको लागि मान्यता दिएको छ। यी हुन् कम्बोडिया, चीन, Gambia, Ghana, इस्लामिक गणराज्य इरान, लाओ लोकशाही जनवादी गणराज्य, Malawi, मेक्सिको, मोरक्को, म्यानमार, नेपा, ओमान, सौदी अरेबिया, Togo र Vanuatu. ट्राहोमा हटाउनको लागि WHO को SAFE रणनीति प्रयोग। बेनिन र मालीले ट्राहोमा हटाउनको लागि, WHO ले सिफारिस गरेको SAFE रणनीति प्रयोग गरेका छन्, र WHO र साझेदारहरूले मद्दत गरेका छन्। SAFE रणनीति समावेश गर्दछ: सर्जिकल उपचारको लागि, ट्राहोमाको पछि जटिलताहरू; एन्टीबायोटिकहरू, संक्रमण हटाउनको लागि; अनुहारको सफाइ; र वातावरण सुधार, विशेष गरी पानी र सानिटरीको पहुँच सुधार, संक्रमण कम गर्न।

translations.source: Through the International Trachoma Initiative, the antibiotic azithromycin is donated by Pfizer to elimination programmes implementing the SAFE strategy. Benin has integrated trachoma elimination interventions with those implemented against other neglected tropical diseases (NTDs), under the umbrella of the National Programme for Communicable Diseases. Trachoma is the third NTD to be eliminated in Benin, after dracunculiasis (in 2009) and gambiense human African trypanosomiasis (in 2021). Mali has conducted trachoma impact and surveillance surveys and rolled out interventions to achieve elimination targets, despite security challenges in the northern regions of the country and sociopolitical upheavals in recent years. Trachoma is the first NTD to be eliminated in Mali, which therefore now joins a global group of 47 countries that have eliminated at least one NTD. “These are impressive public health achievements,” said Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall, Director of the WHO Global NTD Programme. “Benin and Mali demonstrate how strong political will, cross-sector integration, surveillance and community engagement can work in concert to achieve disease elimination.” Significant progress has been made in the fight against trachoma over the past few years. The number of people requiring antibiotic treatment for trachoma in the WHO African Region fell by 84 million, from 189 million in 2014 to 105 million as of June 2022. Note to the editor: Trachoma remains a public health problem in 41 countries (as of June 2022) with an estimated 125 million people living in areas requiring interventions against the disease.
translations.reference: Ngomzamo wesifo samehlo wamazwe angaphandle,antibhayothikhi azithromycin xhase ngePfizer ekuqedweni kwezinhlelo zokwenza zesu leSAFE. I-Benin isihlanganise isifo samehlo ukuqedwa nokungenelela kulabo abaenza okubhekene nezinye izifo ezijwayelekile ezinganakiwe (amaNTD) ngaphansi kwesambulela seNationa Programme for Communicable Disesases. Isifo samehlo ngesesithathu kuNTD ukuqedwa eBenin emva kwedracunculiasis (ngo-2009) negambiese yabantu eAfrika trypanosomiasis (ngo-2021). Imali isicwaninge umthelela wesifo samehlo nocwaningo lokubheka nokukhipha izingenelelo ukuthola okuqondwe ukuqedwa,ngaphandle kwezingqinamba zokuphepha ezifundeni zasenyakatho yezwe nezinkinga zepolitiki yezenhlalakahle eminyakeni yakamuva nje. Isifo samehlo ngesokuqala seNTD ukuqedwa eMali ngakho manje esijoyina iqoqo lomhlaba lamazwe angu-47 aseqede okungenani esisodwa seNTD. "Lokhu ukuzuza kwezempilo yomphakathi okujabulisayo," kusho uDkt Ibrahima Soce Fall uMqondisi woHlelo lweNTD eMhlabeni lweWHO. "I-Benin nemali ikhombisileukuthi kuqine kanjani isifiso sezepolitiki,ukuhlangana kwemikhakha eyahlukene,ukubheka nokukhuluma komphakathi kungasebenza kusivumelwano sokuthola ukuqedwa kwesio." Ukuqhubeka okubalulekile sekwenzekile ekulweni okubhekene nesifo samehlo eminyakeni embalwa edlule. Abantu abaningi badinga kwelashwa nge antibhayothikhi ukuqeda isifo samehlo eWHO Afrikan Region abafika ezigidini ezingu-84 kusuka kuzigidi ezingu-189 ngo-2014 kuya kuzigidi ezingu-105 kusuka ngoNhlangulana 2022. Inothi eliya kumhleli: Isifo samehlo (Trachoma) sizohlala siyinkinga yezempilo yomphakathi emazweni angu-41 (kusuka ngoNhlangulana 2022) ngesibalo esilinganiselwe kuzigidi ezingu-125 zabantu abaphila ezindaweni ezidinga ukungenelela okubhekene nalesifo.
translations.hypothesis: थिए अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय ट्राकोमा पहल, Pfizer ले एजेन्टिक एजेथ्रोमासिन दान गरेको छ, र यसले SAFE रणनीति लागू गर्ने कार्यक्रमहरूले उपयोग गर्ने। बेनिनले ट्राकोमा उन्मूलन कार्यक्रमहरूलाई, साथसाथै अन्य उपेक्षित उष्णकटिबंधीय रोगहरू (NTDs) विरुद्ध लागू गरिएको कार्यक्रमहरूसँग एकीकृत गरेको छ, राष्ट्रिय रोग कार्यक्रम अन्तर्गत। ट्राकोमा हो तेस्रो NTD जुन बेनिनमा उन्मूलन गरिएको, पछि ड्रैकुनुलाईसिस (2009) र गाम्बिएन्स मानव अफ्रिकन ट्रिपानोसोमासिस (2021)। मालीले ट्राकोमाको प्रभाव र निगरानी सर्वेक्षण गरेको, र उन्मूलन लक्ष्य हासिल गर्नका लागि हस्तक्षेपहरू लागू गरेको छ, यद्यपि देशको उत्तर क्षेत्रहरूमा सुरक्षा चुनौतीहरू र हालसालै सामाजिक-राजनीतिक उथलपुथलहरूले चुनौती। ट्राकोमा हो पहिलो NTD जुन मालीमा उन्मूलन गरिएको, र यसले अब 47 देशहरूको एक विश्व समूहमा सामेल भइको, जसमध्ये कम से कम एक NTD लाई उन्मूलन गरेका छन्। "यी प्रभावशाली सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य उपलब्धहरू हुन्," भन्यो WHO ग्लोबल NTD कार्यक्रमका निर्देशक, डा. इब्राहिमा सोसे फाल्। "बेनिन र मालीले हेर्न सक्छन् कसरी शक्तिशाली राजनीतिक इच्छा, विभिन्न क्षेत्रहरूको एकीकरण, निगरानी र समुदायको सहभागिता, रोगको उन्मूलन हासिल गर्न एकअर्का साथ काम गर्न सक्छन्।" पछिल्लो केही वर्षहरूमा, ट्राकोमा विरुद्ध लडिरमा महत्त्वपूर्ण प्रगति हासिल गरिएको छ। WHO अफ्रिकन क्षेत्रमा, ट्राकोमाको लागि एन्टीबायोटिक उपचार आवश्यक पर्ने मानिसहरूको संख्या, 2014 मा 189 मिलियन देखि 2022 जूनसम्म 105 मिलियन, 84 मिलियन घटेको छ। हेरफेर: ट्राकोमा 41 देशहरूमा (2022 जूनसम्म) एक सार्वजनिक स्वास्थ्य समस्या रह्या, र लगभग 125 मिलियन मानिसहरू, जसमध्ये रोग विरुद्ध हस्तक्षेप आवश्यक पर्ने क्षेत्रहरूमा बसिरहेका छन्।

translations.source: Trachoma is found mainly in the poorest and most rural areas of Africa, Central and South America, Asia, the Western Pacific and the Middle East. The WHO African Region is disproportionately affected by trachoma with 105 million people living in at-risk areas, which represents 84% of the global trachoma burden. Trachoma is the leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide. The disease is caused by infection with the bacterium Chlamydia trachomatis. Infection is transmitted from person to person through contaminated fingers, fomites and flies that have come into contact with discharge from the eyes or nose of an infected person. Environmental risk factors for trachoma transmission include poor hygiene, overcrowded households, inadequate access to water or use of proper sanitation facilities. In 1996, WHO launched the WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma by the year 2020 (GET2020). With other partners in the Alliance, WHO supports country implementation of the SAFE strategy and strengthening of national capacity through epidemiological assessment, monitoring, surveillance, project evaluation and resource mobilization contributing towards elimination of trachoma as a public health problem. The road map, endorsed by the World Health Assembly in 2020 through its decision 73(33), sets 2030 as the new target date for global elimination.
translations.reference: Isifo samehlo sitholakala kakhulu ezindaweni ezingamakhaya futhi ezihluphekayo e-Afrika, Maphakathi naseNingizimu neAmerica, Asia naseWestern Pacific kanye neMiddle East. I-WHO African Region itheleleke yisifo samehlo kubantu abayizigidi ezingu 105 abahlala ezindaweni eziyingcuphe,ezimele u-48% womthwalo wesifo samehlo emhlabeni. Isifo samehlo isona esihamba phambili ekuthelelaneni esidala ukungaboni emhlabeni wonke. Isifo sidalwa ukuthelelana ngegciwane iChlamydia trachomatis. Ukuthelelana kudluliseka kumuntu kuye kumuntu ngeminwe engcolile, izinambuzane, izimpukane esezihlangabezane nokungcola okuphuma emahlweni noma ikhala lomuntu othelelekile. Izinkinga zengcephe yendawo yokudluliselwa kwesifo samehlo okufaka ukungahlanzeki,imizi egcwele ukungatholi kahle amanzi nokusebenzisa izindawo zokuzikhulula ezifanele. Ngo-1996, iWHO yethula iWHO Alliane yokuqedwa kwesifo samehlo emhlabeni ngonyaka ka-2020 (GET2020). Nabanye ababambisani kwi-Alliance, iWHO yeseka ukwenza kwezwe kweSu lokuPhepha nokuqinisa amandla ezwe ngokhlolwa kwezobhubhane, ukubheka, ukuhlola, ukubhekisa iphrojekthi nokuhlanganisa izinsizakusebenza ezizosiza ekuqedweni kwesifo samehlo njengenkinga yezempilo yomphakathi. Umgwaqo balazwe ogunyazwe nguMhlangano weZempilo eMhlabeni ngo-2020 ngesinqumo sawo 73(33) ibeka u-2030 njengosuku oluqondiwe olusha lokuqeda emhlabeni.
translations.hypothesis: Trachoma मुख्यतया भेट्टाउन হয় अफ्रिका, मध्य र दक्षिण अमेरिका, एसिया, पश्चिमी प्यासिफिक र मध्य पूर्वका धेरै गरीब र ग्रामीण क्षेत्रहरूमा। WHO अफ्रिका क्षेत्र विशेष रूपमा प्रभावित, जसमा 105 मिलियन मानिस बस्नुका छन्, जुन 84% विश्वव्यापी trachoma भार प्रतिनिधित्व गर्छ। Trachoma विश्वव्यापी रूपमा बलेकोको मुख्य संक्रामक कारण हो। यो रोग Chlamydia trachomatis नामक जीवाणुको संक्रमणले निम्नालो हुन्छ। संक्रमण मानिसबाट मानिसमा फैलन्छ, मार्फत प्रदूषित औजार, सतह र उज्याले, जुन संक्रमित व्यक्तिको आँखा वा नाकबाट निस्सेको स्रावसँग सम्पर्कमा आएको छ। Trachoma संक्रमणका वातावरण जोखिम कारकहरू समावेश छन्: खराब स्वच्छता, घने घरहरू, पर्याप्त पानीको पहुँचको अभाव, वा उचित सानिटरी सुविधाको प्रयोग। 1996 मा, WHO "WHO Alliance for the Global Elimination of Trachoma by the year 2020 (GET2020)" लांन्च गरेको थियो। अन्य साझेदारहरूसँग, WHO देशले SAFE रणनीति लागू गर्न र जनस्वास्थ्य समस्याको रूपमा trachoma लाई हटाउन योगदान दिने, महामारी मूल्याङ्कन, निगरानी, अनुगमन, परियोजना मूल्याङ्कन र स्रोत जुटाвање मार्फत राष्ट्रिय क्षमतालाई बढावा गर्न मद्दत गर्दछ। यो मार्गचित्र, जे 2020 मा विश्व स्वास्थ्य सभाले आफ्नो निर्णय 73(33) मार्फत पारित गरेको, नयाँ लक्ष्य मितिको रूपमा 2030 निर्धारण गर्दछ।

translations.source: 152 million babies born preterm in the last decade Of every 10 babies born, 1 is preterm – and every 40 seconds, 1 of those babies dies Preterm birth rates have not changed in the past decade in any region of the world The impacts of conflict, climate change, COVID-19 are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere Action is needed urgently to improve the prevention of preterm birth, alongside better care for affected babies and their families An estimated 13.4 million babies were born pre-term in 2020, with nearly 1 million dying from preterm complications, according to a new report released by United Nations agencies and partners today. This is equivalent to around 1 in 10 babies born early (before 37 weeks of pregnancy) worldwide. Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth, produced by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) together with PMNCH -- the world’s largest alliance for women, children, and adolescents, sounds the alarm on a “silent emergency” of preterm birth, long under-recognized in its scale and severity, which is impeding progress in improving children’s health and survival. The report includes updated estimates from WHO and UNICEF, prepared with the London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine, on the prevalence of preterm births. Overall, it finds that preterm birth rates have not changed in any region in the world in the past decade, with 152 million vulnerable babies born too soon from 2010 to 2020.
translations.reference: Izigidi ezingu-152 izingane ezizalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kushuminyaka elidlule Ezinganeni ezingu-10 ezizalwayo, eyodwa izalwa phambi kwesikhathi futhi emizuzwini engu-40 eyodwa kulezo ngane iyafa Amazinga okuzalwa kwezingane ngaphambi kwesikhathi awakashintshi kushuminyaka eledlule kunoma yisiphi isifunda emhlabeni Imithelela yengxabano,ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu,ingcuphe yokunyuka kweCOVID-19 kubantu besifazane nezingane yonke indawo Isu liyadingeka ngokushesha ukwenza ngcono ukuvikela ukuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi, okuhambisana nokunakekela okungcono ezinganeni ezikhahlamezekile kanye nemindeni yazo Isilinganiso sezigindi ezingu-13.4 izingane ezizalwe ngaphambi kwesikhathi nokungafika esigidini esisodwa semithelela yokufa, ngokombiko omusha okhishiwe yi-United Nations ama-ejensi kanye nababambisani namhlanje. Lo mzuliswano wokulingana wengane eyodwa kweziyishumi ezisheshe zizalwe (ngaphambi kwamasonto angu-37 okukhulelwa) emhlabeni wonke. Ukusheshe uzalwe: ishuminyaka lokwenza ekuzalweni ngaohambi kwesikhathi, kukhiqizwe Inhlangano yezempilo emhlabeni (WHO) ne United Nations Children Fund (UNICEF) ndawonye nePMNCH -- ubudlelwane obukhulu emhlabeni babantu besifazane, izingane, nentsha, kuveza ukuuthusa bokuthula kokuphuthumayo kwezokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi, okunesikhathi eside kunganakiwe esikalini sakho sobucayi okuveza ukuqhubeka ekwenzeningcono ezempilo zezingane nokuphila. Umbiko ukubuyekezwa kulinganisa okuphuma kuWHO ne-UNICEF, izilungiselele neLondon School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine, ekusabalaleni kokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi. Kukhona konke kutholakala ukuthi amazinga okuzalwa kwezingane ngaphambi kwesikhathi awakashintshi kunoma yisiphi isifunda emhlabeni kuleshuminyaka eledlule nezigidi ezingu-152 zezingane ezihluphekile ezisheshe zazalwa kusuka ngo-2010 kuya ku-2020.
translations.hypothesis: 152 मिलियन नसे जन्मिन भन्दा मघा दशक, मध्ये प्रत्येक 10 नसे, 1 हो जन्म भन्दा मघा – र प्रत्येक 40 सेकन्ड, 1 ती नसे मృతి। दर जन्म भन्दा मघा दशक मा, कतै पनि, यो दर परिवर्तन नगरिएको छ। प्रभावहरू, जस्तै, युद्ध, जलवायु परिवर्तन, र COVID-19, ले महिला र नसेलाई कतै पनि खतरा बढायो। तत्काल कार्य आवश्यक छ, ताकि नसे मघा जन्म रोकथाम सुधार, साथै, प्रभावित नसे र उनका परिवारलाई राम्रो स्याहार। नयाँ रिपोर्ट अनुसार, लगभग 13.4 मिलियन नसे 2020 मा जन्मिन भन्दा मघा, र लगभग 1 मिलियन मघा जन्मको जटिलताबाट मృతి, United Nations सँगको रिपोर्टले बताएको छ। यो लगभग 1 मा 10 नसेको समतुल्य हो (37 हप्ताको गर्भको सेवासँग)। मघा जन्म: दशक, जन्म रोकथाममा, उत्पादन गरिएको, World Health Organization (WHO) र United Nations Children’s Fund (UNICEF) ले, साथसाथै PMNCH – विश्वको सबैभन्दा ठूलो गठजोړ, महिला, नसे, र किशोरहरू, "मघा जन्म" को "अदृश्य आपत्स्य" मा चेतावनी दिन्छ, जे धेरै समयदेखि, यसको पैमाना र गंभीरतामा, पहिचान गरिएको छैन, र जे बच्चाहरूको स्वास्थ्य र जीवनमा सुधारको प्रगति रोक्न। रिपोर्टमा, WHO र UNICEF ले तयार पारेका, लन्डन स्कूल अफ हाइजिन एन्ड ट्रोपिकल मेडिसिन, ले, मघा जन्मको दरमा अद्यतन आंकडा समावेश छन्। कुलमा, रिपोर्टले देखाउँछ, मघा दशक मा, कतै पनि, मघा जन्मको दर परिवर्तन नगरिएको छ, 2010 देखि 2020 सम्म, 152 मिलियन भेद्य नसे मघा जन्मिन।

translations.source: Preterm birth is now the leading cause of child deaths, accounting for more than 1 in 5 of all deaths of children occurring before their 5th birthday. Preterm survivors can face lifelong health consequences, with an increased likelihood of disability and developmental delays. Survival gaps by region, income, race Building from a landmark report on the topic in 2012, this new Born too soon “decade” report provides a comprehensive overview of the prevalence of preterm birth and its profound impact on women, families, societies and economies. Too often, where babies are born determines if they survive. The report notes that only 1 in 10 extremely preterm babies (<28 weeks) survive in low-income countries, compared to more than 9 in 10 in high-income countries. Gaping inequalities related to race, ethnicity, income, and access to quality care determine the likelihood of preterm birth, death, and disability, even in high-income countries. Southern Asia and sub-Saharan Africa have the highest rates of preterm birth, and preterm babies in these regions face the highest mortality risk. Together, these two regions account for more than 65% of preterm births globally. The report also highlights that the impacts of conflict, climate change and environmental damage, COVID-19, and rising living costs are increasing risks for women and babies everywhere.
translations.reference: Ukuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi manje sekuyimbangela eholayo ekufeni kwezingane,ukubala okungaphezu kuka 1 wokungu 5 wakho konke ukufa okwenzeka ngaphambi kosuku lokuzalwa lweminyaka emihlanu. Abaphilayo kwabazalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi babhekana nemiphumela yezempilo impilo yabo yonke, ngokukhula kokujwayeleka kokukhubazeka kanye nokubambezeleka kokukhula. Izikhala zokuphila yisifunda, imali engenayo, ibala Ukwakhela emmbikweni wesikhonkwane esihlokweni sango-2012,lokhu kusheshe uzalwe, ishuminyaka, umbiko unikeza ukubhekwa okukhulu kokusabalala kokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi nomthelela oqinile kwabesifazane, imiphakathi nezomnotho. Kujwayelekile lapho izingane zizalelwe khona kuzonquma ukuthi zizophila yini. Umbiko uqaphela ukuthi uyedwa kuphela kwabangu-10 abantwana abasheshe bazalwa (<amasonto angu-28) abaphilayo emzaweni anemali encane engenayo,uma uqhathanisa kwangaphezu kwangu-9 ku-10 emazweni anemali ephezulu engenayo. Izikhala zokungalingani ezihlobene nebala, nobuzwe nemali engenayo nokthola ukunakekelwa okufanele kukhomba ukuphila kokusheshe uzalwe ukufa kanye nokukhubazeka ngisho nasemazweni anemali ephezulu engenayo. Southern Asia nesub-Saharan Afrika banamazinga aphezulu okusheshe kuzalwe kulezizizfunda futhi abhekene nengcuphe yokushona kwezingane ephezulu. Ndawonye, lezi zifunda ezimbili zibala ngaphezu kuka-65% wezingane ezisheshe zazalwa emhlabeni. Umbiko uphinde uveze umthelela wengxabano,ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu nokulimala kwendawo, COVID-19 nokunyuka kokubiza kwempilo okunyusa ingcuphe kubantu besifazane nezingane yonke indawo.
translations.hypothesis: जन्मबिना समय (preterm birth) अब मुख्य कारण ज्याले बच्चाहरूको मृत्यु, प्रतिनिधित्व गर्छ, र यो धेरै भन्दा 1 मा 5 बच्चाहरूको कुल मृत्यु, जुन उनीहरूका 5औं जन्मदिन भन्दा पहिले हुन्छ। बच्चाहरू जसले जन्मबिना समय अनुभव गरेका छन्, उनीहरूले दीर्घकालीन स्वास्थ्य परिणामहरू भोग्न सक्छन्, जसमा अपंगता र विकासमा ढिलाइको उच्च सम्भावना समावेश छ। भिन्नताहरू अनुसार, आय, जात। यो नयाँ "जन्मबिना समय" रिपोर्ट, 2012 मा प्रकाशित एक महत्त्वपूर्ण रिपोर्टमा आधारित, जन्मबिना समयको व्यापक अवलोकन प्रदान गर्दछ, र यसले महिलाहरू, परिवारहरू, समाजहरू र अर्थव्यवस्थाहरूमा गम्भीर प्रभाव पार्छ। धेरै पटक, बच्चाहरूको जन्मस्थान निर्धारण गर्छ के उनीहरू बाँचेका छन्। रिपोर्टले उल्लेख गर्दछ कि केवल 10 मा 1 धेरै जन्मबिना समयका बच्चाहरू (28 हप्ता भन्दा कम) कम आय भएका देशहरूमा बाँचेका छन्, जबकि उच्च आय भएका देशहरूमा 9 मा 1 भन्दा धेरै बच्चाहरू बाँचेका छन्। जात, जातीयता, आय, र उच्च-आय भएका देशहरूमा पनि, गुणस्तरीय स्याहारको पहुँच, जन्मबिना समय, मृत्यु, र अपंगताको सम्भावना निर्धारण गर्छ। दक्षिण एसिया र सब-सहारन अफ्रिकामा जन्मबिना समयको दर सबैभन्दा उच्च छ, र यी क्षेत्रका बच्चाहरूले सबैभन्दा ठूलो मृत्युको जोखिम भोग्छन्। दुई क्षेत्रहरूले जम्मा 65% भन्दा धेरै जन्मबिना समय विश्वव्यापी रूपमा प्रतिनिधित्व गर्छन्। रिपोर्टले पनि उल्लेख गर्दछ कि संघर्ष, जलवायु परिवर्तन, र वातावरणको क्षति, COVID-19, र बढिरहेको जीवन खर्च, सबै महिलाहरू र बच्चाहरूका लागि जोखिमहरू बढाउँछन्।

translations.source: For example, air pollution is estimated to contribute to 6 million preterm births each year. Nearly 1 in 10 preterm babies are born in the 10 most fragile countries affected by humanitarian crises, according to a new analysis in the report. Maternal health risks, such as adolescent pregnancy and pre-eclampsia, are closely linked to preterm births. This underlines the need to ensure access to sexual and reproductive health services, including effective family planning, with high-quality care in pregnancy and around the time of birth. Agenda for action: more country investment and parent-led activism The past decade has also seen a growth of community activism on preterm birth and stillbirth prevention, driven by networks of parents, health professionals, academia, civil society, and others. Throughout the world, groups for affected families of preterm birth have been at the forefront of advocating for access to better care and policy change and supporting other families. Leading up to the International Maternal Newborn Health Conference, in Cape Town, South Africa from 8-11 May, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA and PMNCH are calling for the following actions to improve care for women and newborns and mitigate risks from preterm births: Increased investments: Mobilizing international and domestic resources to optimize maternal and newborn health, ensuring high quality care is provided when and where it is needed. Accelerated implementation: Meeting country targets for progress through implementing established national policies for maternal and newborn care.
translations.reference: Isibonelo, ukungcola komoya kulinganiselwa ukuthi kunomthelela wezigidi ezingu-6 zokusheshe kuzalwe unyaka ngamunye. Kungafika ku 1 kwabangu 10 izingane ezisheshe zazalwa ezizalwe emazweni abuthaka angu-10 akhahlamezwe izinkinga zabantu ngokokuhlaziya okusha embikweni. Ingcuphe yomama abakhulelwe, njengokukhulelwa kwamatshitshi kusondelene nokusheshe uzale. Lokhu kugqamisa isidingo sokuqinisekisa ukuthola ezempilo zokuzala nezocansi, okufaka ukusebenza kokuhlela umndeni, ukunakekelwa okusezingeni eliphezulu kwabakhulelwe nangesikhathi sokuzala. Ajenda yokwenza: utshalomali oluningi ezweni nokushoshova okuholwa ngabazali Ishuminyaka eledlulesibone ukukhula kwezishoshovu emphakathini ekuvinjweni kokusheshe kuzalwe kwezingane, okuholwa uhlelokuxhumana lwabazali, izifundiswa zempilo, izifundiswa umphakathi nabanye. Ezweni lonke amaqoqo emindeni ekhahlamezekile ngokusheshe kuzalwe kwengane alokhu ephambili ekumeleni ukuthola ukunakekelwa okungcono nokushinthwa kwenqubomgomo nokweseka imindeni. Okuholela kuInternational Maternal Newborn Helath Conference, eKapa eNingizimu Afrika kusuka ngo-8-11 kuNhlaba, iWHO, i-UNICEF, i-UNFPA nePMNCH bamemezela ukulandela izenzo ukwenza ngcono ukunakekela kwabesifazane nabazelwe ubukhulu bezingcuphe okuvela kokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi. Ukunyuswa kotshalomali:ukuhlanganisa izinsizakusebenza zamazwe angaphandle nezendawo ukusiza ezempilo zomama nezingane ezizelwe, ukuqinisekisa ukunakekelwa okuphezulu kuyanikezwa uma noma nalapho kudingeka khona. Ukunyuswa kokwenza: Ukuhlangabezana nokuqondwe ngamazwe kokuqhubeka ngokwenza okusungulwe yinqubomgomo yezwe kokunakekelwa komama nezingane ezizelwe.
translations.hypothesis: उदाहरणको, प्रदूषणEstimated योगदानमा 6 मिलियन नसेले जन्म हरेक वर्ष। लगभग 1 मा 10 नसेले जन्म, लगभग 10 धेरै कमजोर देशहरू, जुन मानवीय संकटले प्रभावित, अनुसार नयाँ विश्लेषणमा रिपोर्ट। मातेर स्वास्थ्य जोखिम, जस्तै किशोर गर्भावस्था र प्री-एक्ल्याम्पसिया, निकट सम्बद्धतामा नसेले जन्म। यसले, सुनिश्चित गर्न आवश्यक छ, यौन र प्रजनन स्वास्थ्य सेवाहरू, समावेश परिवार नियोजन, उच्च-गुणवत्ता सेवा, गर्भावस्था र जन्मको समयमा। कार्यको एजेंडा: थप देशको लगानी र अभिभावक-नेतृत्व सक्रियता। विगतको दशकले, थप समुदाय सक्रियता, नसेले जन्म र मृत जन्म रोकथाम, अभिभावक, स्वास्थ्य पेशेवर, शिक्षा, नागरिक समाज, र अन्य नेटवर्क द्वारा संचालित। सम्पूर्ण जहान, नसेले जन्मको प्रभावित परिवार समूह, कति रामे सेवा र नीति परिवर्तनको लागि लडिरहेका छन्, र अन्य परिवारहरूलाई समर्थन। अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय मातेर र नसेले स्वास्थ्य सम्मेलन, जो Cape Town, दक्षिण अफ्रिका, 8-11 मे, WHO, UNICEF, UNFPA र PMNCH, महिला र नसेलेको हेरफेर र नसेले जन्मको जोखिमहरू कम गर्न, निम्न कार्यहरूमा आह्वान: बढी लगानी: मातेर र नसेलेको स्वास्थ्यलाई अनुकूल बनाउन, अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय र स्थानीय स्रोतहरूलाई mobilizing, उच्च-गुणवत्ता सेवा प्रदान गरिने। तेर्सक कार्यान्वयन: मातेर र नसेलेको हेरफेरको लागि स्थापित राष्ट्रिय नीतिको कार्यान्वयन मार्फत, देशको लक्ष्य हासिल।

translations.source: Integration across sectors: Promoting education through the life cycle; supporting smarter economic investments, with co-financing across sectors; strengthening climate adaptation responses across the life-course; and advancing the coordination and resilience of emergency systems. Locally driven innovation: Investing in locally led innovation and research to support improvements in quality of care and equity in access. Quotes: Prof. Joy Lawn, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine Co-lead, Born too soon: decade of action on preterm birth (2023) and Born too soon (2012) "This new report shows that the cost of inaction over the last decade was 152 million babies born too soon. While some regions are more affected, preterm birth threatens health progress in every country. Greater investment in the care of vulnerable newborns can save millions of families from heartbreak. More work is also needed to prevent preterm birth, which will also improve progress in reducing stillbirths and maternal deaths. Together these twin tracks of preterm prevention and care will produce healthier individuals and societies to deliver on economic and social development. Our next generation depends on us all acting now -- the investment may not be small but the returns on this investment will be major for every country"
translations.reference: Ukuhlanganisa kuyona yonke imikhakha: Ukugqugquzela ezemfundo ngempilo, ukweseka utshalomali lwezomnotho oluhlakaniphile, nokubambisana kwezimali kuyona yonke imikhakha, ukuqinisa ukuhambisana kwesimo sezulu nokuphendula kuyona yonke impilo, ukwenza ngcono ukuxhumana nokubekezela ezinhlelweni eziphuthumayo. Okwenziwa abendawo okusha: ukutshala endaweni okuholwa okusha nocwaningo lokweseka intuthuko yokunakekelwa okuhle nokuthola ngokulingana. Okucashuniwe: uSolwazi Joy Lawn, London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine Omunye wabaholayoUsheshe wazalwa-ishuminyaka lwesenzo ekushesheni uzalwe (2023) noKusheshe uzalwe (2012) "Lombiko omusha ukhombisa ukuthi ukubiza kokungenzi kulelishuminyaka eledlule kwakuyizigidi ezingu-152 ezisheshe zazalwa. Ngesikhathi kwezinye izifunda bekhahlamezeke kakhulu ukusheshe uzale kusabisa ukuqhubeka kwezempilo kuwona wonke amazwe. Utahlomali olukhulu ekunakekelweni kwabazelwe ababuthaka kungasindisa izigidi zemindeni ekuphukeni kwenhliziyo. Umsebenzi omuningi uyadingeka ukugwema ukusheshe kuzalwe, okuzophinde kwenze ngcono ukuqhubeka kokwehlisa ukufa komama nezingane ezisheshe zazalwa. Ndawonye lokhu okubili kokuvikela ukusheshe kuzalwe nokunakekelwa kuzokhiqiza abantu abanempilo nemiphakathi ukuletha kwezomnotho kanye nokuthuthukiswa kwenhlalakahle. Isizukulwane sethu esizayo sincike kuthina kukhona konke esikwenzayo manje-utshalomali ngeke lube luncane kodwa izimbuyiselo kulolutshalomali luzoba lukhulu kakhulu wonke amazwe"
translations.hypothesis: एकाीकरण तर्फे: प्रोत्साहनको माध्यमबाट शिक्षा; स्मार्ट आर्थिक लगानी, साथै विभिन्न क्षेत्रहरूमा सह-वित्तपोषण; जीवनचक्रभर जलवायु अनुकूलन प्रतिक्रियाहरूलाई सुदृढीकरण; र आपत्कालीन प्रणालीको समन्वय र लचीलापन बढावा। स्थानीय नेतृत्वको नवोन्मेष: स्थानीय नेतृत्वको नवोन्मेष र अनुसन्धानमा लगानी, ताकि सेवाको איכות र पहुँचमा सुधार हासिल भइन्। उदहारण: प्रा. जोय लौन, लन्डन स्कूल अफ हाइजिन & ट्रोपिकल मेडिसिन, सह-अध्यक्ष, "जुनैं जल्द जन्म": दशको कार्य (2023) र "जुनैं जल्द जन्म" (2012) "यस नयाँ रिपोर्टले देखाउँछ कि, पछिल्लो दशको निष्क्रियताको लागत छ 152 मिलियन बच्चाहरू जुन जल्द जन्म। यद्यपि केही क्षेत्रहरूले धेरै प्रभाव, जल्द जन्मले प्रत्येक देशमा स्वास्थ्य प्रगतिलाई खतरा। कमजोर नवजात शिशुहरूको स्याहारमा थप लगानी, हजारौं परिवारलाई दु:खबाट जोगाउन सक्छ। थप काम पनि आवश्यक छ, ताकि जल्द जन्म रोकिन्छ, जेले पनि, मृत जन्म र मातृ मृत्यु दर घटाउनको प्रगति सुधार। दुईवटा मार्ग - जल्द जन्मको रोकथाम र स्याहार - एकअर्का साथ काम गरेर, स्वस्थ व्यक्ति र समाज निर्माण गर्न मद्दत गर्ने। हाम्रो भविष्य निर्भर छ, सबैले अहिले कार्य गर्न। लगानीले सानो न हो, तर यो लगानीले प्रत्येक देशको लागि महत्त्वपूर्ण प्रतिफल ल्याउने।"

translations.source: Dr Nahya Salim, Tanzania: Born Too Soon co-author and national lead of Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360) “There is now no excuse for silence. We now have in our hands the devices and the knowledge to change outcomes for our most vulnerable newborns. I am proud to see my government now investing and committed to implementation across even rural areas. The next decade can and must be different for those facing preterm birth here and everywhere.” Dr Anshu Banerjee, Director for Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing at WHO “Ensuring quality care for these tiniest, most vulnerable babies and their families is absolutely imperative for improving child health and survival. Progress is also needed to help prevent preterm births -- this means every woman must be able to access quality health services before and during pregnancy to identify and manage risks.” Steven Lauwerier, Director of Health (a.i.), UNICEF “After every preterm death is a trail of loss and heartbreak.
translations.reference: uDkt Nahya Salim,waseTanzania: Ukusheshe uzalwe omunye wababhali nezwe eliholwa ngeNewborn Essentials Solutions and Technology 360 (NEST360) "Asisekho manje isizathu sokuthula. Manje sinamadivayisi ezandleni zethu kanye nolwazi lukushintsha imiphumela yezingane zethu ezihluphekile ezizelwe. Ngiyaziqhenya ukubona uhulumeni wethu manje etshala futhi ezibophezela ukwenza yonke indawo ngisho nasemakhaya. Ishuminyaka elizayo lingaba futhi kumele lihluke kulabo ababhekene zokusheshe bazale lana nakuyona yonke indawo." UDkt Anshu Banerjee, uMqondisi wabakhulelwe, abazelwe, izingane nentsha kwezempilo kanye nokuguga eWHO "Ukuqinisekisa ukunakekelwa okufanele kwabancane, abantekenteke nemindeni yabo kufanele impela nokwenzangcono ezempilo nokuphila komntwana. Inqubekela phambili iyadingeka futhi ukusiza ukuvikela ukusheshe bazale-lokhu kusho ukuthi wonke umuntu wesifazane kumele akwazi ukuthola ezempilo ezifanele ngaphambi nangesikhathi sokukhulelwa ukuze kuhlonzwe futhi kuphathwe izingcuphe." USteven Lauwerier, uMqondisi weZempilo (a.i.), e-UNICEF "Ngemva kokufa kokusheshe uzalwe njalo ukulandelana kokulahlekelwa nokuphuka kwenhliziyo.
translations.hypothesis: डा. Nahya Salim, मोजाम्बिक: सह-लेखक र सदस्य र राष्ट्रिय नेता, "Newborn Essential Solutions and Technologies 360 (NEST360)" "अब אין कारण न मौन। अब हामी छौस, उपकरण र ज्ञान, ताकि हामीสามารถ फेरबदल गछौं अवस्थाका लागि हाम्रा धेरै कमजोर नवजात शिशुहरू। म खुसी छु कि सरकारमा अब लगानी र प्रतिबद्धता छ, र यसले ग्रामीण क्षेत्रहरूमा पनि कार्यान्वयन गरिरहेको छ। अर्को दशक, र यो अवश्य पनि फरक हुनुपर्छ, उनुलाई जेले यहाँ र पर, समयपूर्व जन्म।" डा. Anshu Banerjee, निर्देशक, Maternal, Newborn, Child and Adolescent Health and Ageing, WHO "सुनिश्चित गछौं उच्च स्तरको स्याहार, र यी धेरै कमजोर नवजात शिशुहरू र उनका परिवारहरू, र यसले बालको स्वास्थ्य र बाँचे रहनेमा सुधार गर्न अनिवार्य। साथै, समयपूर्व जन्महरू रोक्नको लागि पनि आवश्यक छ - यस अर्थ, प्रत्येक महिलाले गर्भधारण अगाडि र केबल, जोखिमहरू पहिचान र व्यवस्थापन गर्न, उच्च स्तरको स्वास्थ्य सेवा प्रयोग गर्न सक्षम हुनुपर्छ।" Steven Lauwerier, निर्देशक, Health (a.i.), UNICEF "यस प्रत्येक समयपूर्व मृत्यु, एक हानि र दु:खको कथा हो।

translations.source: Despite the many advances the world has made in the past decade, we have made no progress in reducing the number of small babies born too soon or averting the risk of their death. The toll is devasting. It’s time we improve access to care for pregnant mothers and preterm infants and ensure every child gets a healthy start and thrives in life.” Helga Fogstad, Executive Director, PMNCH “Born too soon underlines why we must increase investment and accountability for preterm birth – the world’s largest cause of death of children under the age of five. Progress is flatlining for maternal and newborn health, as well as the prevention of stillbirths, and is now pushed back further through the devastating combination of COVID-19, climate change, expanding conflicts and rising living costs. “By working together in partnership – governments, donors, the private sector, civil society, parents, and health professionals – we can sound the alarm about this “silent emergency”, and bring preterm prevention and care efforts to the forefront of national health and development efforts, building human capital by supporting families, societies and economies everywhere. ”Gabriela and Jerome Foster, Las Vegas, United States: parents of Jalen Foster, and founders of Jalen’s Gift Foundation “Our foundation was founded after the loss of our son, Jalen Foster, who was a preterm stillbirth at 27 weeks due to prenatal onset of a bacteria known as group B streptococcus. Losing our son was devastating, and there was no support in the community and that’s when we decided to provide a place of comfort and hope for families who have lost a baby.
translations.reference: Ngaphandle kobungcono okuningi emhlabeni esikwenzile eshumininyaka eledlule, asikenzi nqubekela phambili ekwehliseni inamba yezingane ezincane ezisheshe zizalwe noma sivimbe ingcuphe ekuzalweni kwabo. Loluhambo luyakhubaza. Yisikhathi sokwenza ngcono ukuthola ukunakekelwa komama abakhulelwe kanye nezingane ezizalwe kungashayi isikhathi nokuqinisekisa ukuthi yonke ingane ithola ukuqala kwezempilo nokuphokophela empilweni." UHelga Fogstad, uMqondisi Omkhulu, wePMNCH Ukusheshe uzalwe kusho incazelo yokuthi kumele sinyuse utshalomali nesibophezelo kwabasheshe bazalwa - imbangela enkulu emhlabeni yokufa kwezingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka emihlanu. Ukuqhubeka kokulinganisa kumama nezempilo zomntwana ozelwe, kanye nokuvikelwa kokuzalwa kwabantwana kungakashayi isikhathi, manje sekubekwe emuva ngokuhlanganiswa okukhathazayo kweCOVID-19, ukuguquka kwesimo sezulu, ukwandisa izingxabano nokukhulisa izindleko zokuphila. Ngokusebenza ndawonye ngokubambisana - uhulumeni, abaxhasi, umkhakha ozimele, umphakathi, abazali, izifundiswa zempilo - singaveza inkinga ngokuthula kokuphuthuma nokuletha ukuvikelwa kokuzalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi nemizamo yokunakelewa phambili kwezempilo yezwe nemizamo yokuthuthukisa, ukwakha amandla omuntu ngokweseka imindeni, imiphakathi nezomnotho yonke indawo. "UGabriela noJerome Foster, e-Las Vegas, e-United States: abazali baJalen Foster, abasunguli beJalen Gift Foundation "Indawo yethu yasungulwa ngemva kokushona komfana wethu, uJalen Foster, owasheshe wazalwa enamasonto angu-27 ngenxa yokusheshe ngisikwe ngegciwane elingaziwa njengeqoqo B streptococcus. Ukulahlekelwa yindodana yethu kwasifakela ingcindezi futhi kwakungekho ukwesekwa emphakathini nokuthi ngesikhathi sinquma ukunikezela ngendawo ukududuza nokunika ithemba emindenini elahlekelwe ngumntwana.
translations.hypothesis: यद्यपि संसारले विगत दशकोशमा धेरै प्रगति हासिल गरेको छ, हामीले बाल अवस्थामा जन्मिएको धेरै बच्चाहरू, वा उनीहरूको मृत्युको जोखिमलाई कम नहुँ, यसमा कुनै प्रगति हासिल गरेको छैन। यो स्थिति निक बेर. अब, हामीले गर्भवती आमाहरू र नवजात शिशुहरूलाई स्याहारको पहुँच सुधार, र यो सुनिश्चित गर्न आवश्यक छ कि प्रत्येक बच्चा स्वस्थ रूपमा शुरू र जीवनमा फराकिलो। "हेल्गा फोgstad, कार्यकारी निर्देशक, PMNCH "बाल अवस्थामा जन्मिएको"ले हामीले के कसें गर्नुपरेको छ, यसमा स्पष्ट, - यो संसारमा पाँच वर्ष मुनि रहेका बच्चाहरूको मृत्युको मुख्य कारण। प्रग्रेसमा कमी आउछ, जसमा मातृ र नवजात शिशुको स्वास्थ्य, साथै मृत शिशुको रोकथाम समावेश, र यो विनाशकारी संयोजनको कारणले, अर्थात् COVID-19, जलवायु परिवर्तन, बढिरहेका संघर्ष, र जीवन खर्च, यसले थप बिगड़िएको छ। "जब हामी मिलेर काम गर्छौं - सरकार, दाता, खाजगी क्षेत्र, नागरिक समाज, अभिभावक, र स्वास्थ्य विशेषज्ञ - हामीले यो "молчаनेको संकट" बारे चेतावनी दिन सक्छौं, र नवजात शिशुको रोकथाम र स्याहारको प्रयासलाई राष्ट्रिय स्वास्थ्य र विकासको पहिलो प्राथमिकता बनाउन सक्छौं, परिवार, समाज र अर्थव्यवस्थाहरूलाई मद्दत गरेर मानव स्रोत विकास। "गैब्रिएला र जेरोम फोस्टर, लास वेगास, संयुक्त राज्य अमेरिका: जेलेन फोस्टरका अभिभावक, र जेलेनको उपहारका संस्थाका संस्थापक "हाम्रो संस्था स्थापना भएपछि, हाम्रो छोरा, जेलेन फोस्टर, 27 हफ्तामा, एउटा जीवाणुको कारणले मृत शिशुको रूपमा जन्मिएको थियो। हाम्रो छोरा गुमाउनु निक बेर, र समुदायमा कुनै मद्दत उपलब्ध थिएन, र त्यसबेला हामीले उनिहरूका लागि आराम र आशाको स्थान प्रदान गर्ने निर्णय गरेका थियौं।

translations.source: We didn’t want other families to feel like we did – alone. So, we started Jalen’s Gift Foundation to help other families going through a loss, to provide multiple free services, such as photograph, grief support and help towards memorial services.” ***Download the Born too soon media resources
translations.reference: Besingafuni eminye imindeni izezwe njengba sazizwa - uwedwa. Ngakho, siqale iJalen's Gift Foundation ukusiza imindeni elahlekelwe, ukubanikeza usizo lwamahhala oluningi, njengezithombe, ukwesekwa kokuzila nokubasiza ezinhlelweni zesikhumbuzo." ***Landa usheshe wazalwa kuzinsizakusebenza zezindaba
translations.hypothesis: हाथिर चाहँय अन्य परिवार महसूस गनु, जस्तै हामी – एक्लो। त्यसैले, हामी सुरुन् Jalen’s Gift Foundation, ताकि मद्दतीक अन्य परिवार जो अनुभव गनु हानि, र प्रदान गनु विभिन्न निःशुल्क सेवा, जस्तै, तस्बिर, apoio भावनात्मक, र मद्दतीक सेवाया।

translations.source: UAE and WHO deliver air lift of critical medical supplies to Sudan The United Arab Emirates (UAE) and the World Health Organization have delivered 30 tons of urgent medical supplies to Sudan today. A plane carrying supplies for injury treatment, emergency surgeries, and essential drugs arrived in Port Sudan Airport early this morning. The shipment, valued at US$ 444 000, is the first that WHO has been able to deliver by air to Sudan since the outbreak of the conflict. WHO distributed supplies to heath facilities prior to the escalation of conflict. These were exhausted after a few days given the number of injured. The dispatch of the aircraft comes as part of the UAE's continuous relief efforts in support of the Sudanese people and reflects its deep relations with Sudan, particularly in light of the current situation the country is facing. The relief is also an extension of the UAE’s humanitarian vision and underscores its relations with other countries based on human fraternity and its commitment to assisting others during crises and emergency situations. Dr Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Minister of State for International Cooperation, said that the UAE "continues to work closely alongside the World Health Organization to ensure the successful deployment of the critical logistics operations to send urgent medical and food aid to help address the current crisis in Sudan. In parallel with calls for all sides of the current conflict to immediately cease hostilities and de-escalate a situation that is causing untold suffering for the Sudanese people, the UAE is steadfast in its commitment to providing aid and assistance to countries in times of need.
translations.reference: I-UEA neWHO ihambise iziphakamisi moya zamasaplayi ezokwelapha ezibucayi eSudan United Arab Emirates (UAE) neNhlangano yeZempilo eMhlabeni (WHO) bahambise amathoni angu-30 amasaplayi ezokwelapha okuphuthumayo eSudan namhlanje. Ibhanoyi eliphethe amasaplayi yokwelapha abalimele, ukuhlinza okuphuthumayokanye nezidakamizwa eziphuthumayo lifike isikhumulweni samabhanoyi iPort Sudan ekuseni kakhulu. Ukuhanjswa kwenani elingu US$ 444 000, eyokuqala iWHO ekwazile ukuyihambisa ngezomoya iya eSudan kusukela kube nokubheduka kwengxabano. I-WHO ihambise amasaplayi ezindaweni zempilo ngaphambi kokunyuka kwengxabano. Babekhathele ngemva kwezinsuku ezimbalwa uma ubheka inamba yabalimele. Ukukhishwa kwendizamshini kuza njengengxenye ye-UAE imizamo yokuqhubeka nokukhulula ekwesekeni abantu baseSudanese nokuveza ubuhlobo obunzulu neSudan, ikakhulukazi ngokwesimo samanje esibhekene nezwe. Ukukhululwa kuphinde kube ukululwa kobuntu be-UAE umbono nesikalo sobudlelwano namanye amazwe ancike kubantu nouzibophezela kokusiza abanye ngezikhathi zezinkinga nezimo eziphuthumayo. UDkt Reem bint Ebrahim Al Hashimy, Unqongqoshe wezwe leInternational Cooperation, uthe i-UAE izoqhubeka nokusebenzisana neNhlangano yezempilo emhlabeni ukuqinisekisa ukubekwa okuyimpumelelo kokusebenza kwelojistikhi ebucayi nokuthumela ezokwelapha ngokuphuthuma nosizo lokudla ukusiza ukubhekana nenkinga yamanje eSudan. Nokuhambisana nesimemezelo kuzona zonke izinngxenye zengxabano yamanje ukuyeka manje unya nokuqhuba isimo esidala ukuhlupheka okungashiwo kubantu baseSudan, i-UAE isheshile ekuzibophezelei kwayo ukunikeza usizo nokusiza mazwe ngesikhathi beludinga.
translations.hypothesis: UAE र WHO ले अत्यावश्यक चिकित्सा सामग्रीलाई सुडानमा पोहचरा आज, संयुक्त अरब एमिरात (UAE) र विश्व स्वास्थ्य सङ्गठनले सुडानलाई 30 टन अत्यावश्यक चिकित्सा सामग्री पोहचराएका छन्। एउटा विमान, मार्ने उपचार, அவिल्यक शल्यक्रिया र आवश्यक औषधिको सामग्री ले, यस प्रातः जल्दी पोर्ट सुडान विमानस्थलमा आइपुग्ला। यो शिपमेन्ट, जो US$ 444,000 मूल्यको छ, पहिलो हो जे WHO सुडानमा, यद्यपि संघर्ष सुरु भइरहेको थियो, सफलतापूर्वक वायुमार्गमार्फत पोहचराउन सफल भइको। WHO ले संघर्ष तीव्र हुनुअघि, स्वास्थ्य सेवा केन्द्रहरूलाई सामग्री वितरण गरेको। यी सामग्रीहरू, दुखेरा भएका व्यक्तिहरूको संख्या हेरफेर, केही दिनपछि समाप्त भयो। यो विमानको पठाउन, UAE ले सुडानका मानिसहरूलाई मद्दत गर्न, र देशले सामना गरिरहेको वर्तमान परिस्थितिमा, सुडानसँगको गहिरो सम्बन्धको हिस्सा हो। यो मद्दत, UAE ले मानवीय दृष्टिकोणको विस्तार हो, र यसले अन्य देशहरूसँगको सम्बन्धलाई उजागर गर्दछ, र मानवीय एकतामा आधारित छ, र संकट र அவिल्यक अवस्थामा अरुलाई मद्दत गर्न प्रतिबद्ध छ। डा. रीम बिन एब्राहिम अल हशमी, अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय सहयोगका राज्य मन्त्रीले बताए, "UAE, विश्व स्वास्थ्य सङ्गठनसँग नजिकको सहकार्य जारी राखेको छ, ताकि अत्यावश्यक चिकित्सा र भोजन मद्दत सुडानमा पठाउन, र यस वर्तमान संकटलाई समाधान गर्न मद्दत पुर्‍याउन सकू। यसैको अतिरिक्त, सबै पक्षहरूले तत्काल युद्धविराम गर्न र सुडानका मानिसहरूलाई जोला दुःखको सामना गरिरहेको परिस्थितिलाई कम गर्न आह्वान गरिरहेका छन्, UAE, आवश्यकताको समयमा देशहरूलाई मद्दत र सहायता प्रदान गर्न प्रतिबद्ध छ।

translations.source: The UAE is particularly focused on providing for the most vulnerable groups affected by the situation in Sudan, especially the sick, children, the elderly, and women who are most at risk from the ongoing concerning conflict – and these relief flights will directly address the most pressing gaps in medical and food provision. The UAE's deeply held humanitarian values have meant that it has ensured it has continued to communicate to the world its robust and unrelenting dedication to strengthening peace, security and stability, not just regionally, but also worldwide, whilst alongside its partners and the international community, the country continues to assist the Sudanese people in times of crisis.” The health supplies include enough trauma, emergency surgical supplies, and essential medicines to immediately reach 165 000 people who are in desperate need of humanitarian aid. Health facilities across the country report they have run out of basic health supplies and that national medical stores are no longer accessible due to the security situation. Among other support, WHO is deploying two emergency logisticians travelling with the cargo to ensure that these supplies are immediately distributed to 13 major health facilities to support healthcare workers and extend care to those in need. WHO has another 30 metric tons of supplies for malaria and noncommunicable diseases like diabetes and hypertension, conditions that can become deadly if left untreated. These and about 23 000 blood bags are being readied within the WHO global logistics hub in the International Humanitarian City, and WHO is currently exploring all possibilities for delivering these supplies to Sudan as quickly as possible in collaboration with the Sudanese Ministry of Health. Dr Michael Ryan, Executive Director, of the WHO Health Emergencies Programme, said, “The WHO Global Logistics Hub in the UAE has become a centerpiece of rapid supply response to acute events globally. Supporting over 140 countries across all 6 WHO geographic regions, the hub provides a lifeline to Member States experiencing health emergencies arising from outbreaks of diseases, disasters such as floods and earthquakes, and the impact of conflict on health systems. The support provided by the UAE enables WHO to be at the forefront of these health emergency responses – delivering specialist medical aid to those in need wherever and whenever it is needed.
translations.reference: I-UAE igxile kakhulu ekunikezeni amaqoqo abuthaka kakhulu akhahlamezekile kulesisimo saseSudan, ikakhulukazi abagulayo, izingane,nabadala nabesifazane abasengcupheni yokuqhubeka kwengxabano - futhi lamabhanoyi akhululayo azobhekana ngqo nezikhala eziphuthumayo kwezokulapha kanye nokuhlinzekwa ngokudla. I-UAE igcine ngokujula ubuntu kusho ukuthi isiqinisekisile iyaqhubeka nokuxhumana nokumhlaba okukhulu nokuzinikela kokuqinisa ukuthula, ukuphepha nozinzo, ayi esizindeni kuphela kodwa emhlabeni wonke ngesikhathi nababambisani nomphakathi wamazwe angaphandle, izwe liyaqhubeka nokusiza iSudanese ezikhathini ezinzima. Amasaplayi ezempiloafaka ukuthuka okwanele, amasaplayi okuhlinza okuphuthumayo nemithi ebalulekile ukuthi ifike manje kubantu abangu-165 000 abadinga kakhulu usizo lobuntu. Izindawo zezempilo ezweni lonke zibika ukuthi seziphelelwe masaplayi ayisisekelo sezempilo nokuthi izitolo zokwelapha zezwe akusafinyeleki kuzona ngenxa yezokuphepha ezweni. Kokunye ukwesekwa, iWHO izobeka amalojistikhi amabili okuphuthumayo ukuhamba ngebhanoyi ukuqinisekisa lamasaplayi asehanjiswa ezindaweni zempilo ezinkulu ezingu-13 ukweseka abasebenzi bezempilo nokwengeza ukunakekela kulabo abakudingayo. WHO inamathoni amakhulu angu-30 amasaplayi amalalwveva nezifo okungaxhunyanwa ngazo njengehayihayi noshukela, izimo ezingabulala uma zishiywa zingalashiwe. Lokhu nezikhwama zegazi ezingu-23 000 sezilungisiwe nelojistikhi yomhlaba yeWHO uhabhu kuInternational Humanitarian City neWHO njengamanje ibheka zonke izindlela zokuletha lamasaplayi eSudan ngokushesha ekubambisaneni noNgqongqoshe weZempilo eSudan. UDkt Michael Ryan, uMqondisi omkhulu wohlelo lweziphuthumayo zempilo weWHO, uthe Iwho Global Logistic Hub e-UAE isibe okubalulekile kokuphindeka kwempendulo yesaplayi esigamekweni ezibucayi emhlabeni. Ukweseka amazwe angaphezu kuka-140 kuzona zonke izindawo zezifunda zweWHO, ihabhu inikezela ngempilo yonke yeMember States kusipiliyoni sokuphuthumayo kwezempilo okuvelayo ekubhedukeni kwezifo, izinhlekelele njengezikhukhula nokuzamazama komhlaba, nomthelela wengxabano ezinhlelweni zempilo. Ukwesekwa okunikeziwe yi-UAE ivumele iWHO ukuthi ibe phambili ekuphenduleni kweziphuthumayo zempilo-ukuhambisa usizo longoti bezokwelapha kulabo abadingayo lapho kudingeka khona.
translations.hypothesis: युएई विशेष रूपमा केन्द्रित छ, र यसले लक्षित समूह, विशेष रूपमा बिमार, बच्चाहरू, वृद्ध, र महिला, जे जोखिममा छन्, र जे लगातार चिंतातमा छ – र यी राहत उडानहरूले प्रत्यक्ष रूपमा चिकित्सा र भोजनको अपूर्णताहरू समाधान गर्ने। युएईको गहिरो मानवीय मूल्यहरूले सुनिश्चित गरेको छ, र यसले लगातार दुलाई बताउन जारी राखेको छ, यसले शान्ति, सुरक्षा र स्थिरतालाई सुदृढीकरण गर्न, न केवल क्षेत्रमा, तर पनि विश्वव्यापी रूपमा, तथा साझेदारहरू र अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय समुदायसँग, देशले क्राइसिसको समयमा सुडान मानिसहरूलाई मद्दत गर्न जारी राखेको छ। स्वास्थ्य सामग्री समावेश पर्याप्त मात्रा, அவिलन्त शल्य चिकित्सा सामग्री, र आवश्यक औषधहरू, जे तत्काल 165,000 मानिसहरूलाई मानवीय मद्दत आवश्यक छ। देशभरका स्वास्थ्य प्रतिष्ठानहरूले रिपोर्ट गरेका छन्, जे आधारभूत स्वास्थ्य सामग्री समाप्त भएका छन्, र सुरक्षाको अवस्थाले राष्ट्रिय चिकित्सा भण्डारहरू अब उपलब्ध छैनन्। अन्य मद्दतमध्ये, डब्ल्यूएचओले दुई அவिलन्त रसद विशेषज्ञहरू, जे कार्गोसहित यात्रा गर्ने, सुनिश्चित गर्न, जे यी सामग्रीहरू तत्काल 13 मुख्य स्वास्थ्य प्रतिष्ठानहरूमा वितरण गरिन्छ, जे स्वास्थ्य работकहरूलाई मद्दत गर्न र जे आवश्यक छ, जे मद्दत गर्न। डब्ल्यूएचओले 30 टन मलेरिया र गैर-संक्रामक रोगहरू जस्तै मधुमेह र उच्च रक्तचाप, जे घातक हुन सक्छ यदि उपचार नगरिएको छ, सामग्रीहरू, जे डब्ल्यूएचओको जागतिय रसद केन्द्र, अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय मानवीय शहर, मा तयार गरिन्छ, र डब्ल्यूएचओ अहिले सुडानमा यी सामग्रीहरू यथासक्य सहयोगमा वितरण गर्ने सबै सम्भावनाहरू खोल्दै छ। डा. माइकल रायन, डब्ल्यूएचओ स्वास्थ्य आपत्क कार्यक्रमका कार्यकारी निर्देशक, भन्छन्, "डब्ल्यूएचओको जागतिय रसद केन्द्र, युएई मा, तीव्र आपूर्ति प्रतिक्रियाको केन्द्र बन्यो। 6 डब्ल्यूएचओ भौगोलिक क्षेत्रहरूमा 140 भन्दा बढी देशहरूलाई मद्दत गर्दै, केन्द्र सदस्य राष्ट्रहरूलाई, जे रोगहरूको प्रकोप, प्रकोप जस्तै बाढी र भूकम्प, र संघर्षले स्वास्थ्य प्रणालीमा प्रभाव पार्न, स्वास्थ्य आपत्क घटनाहरू उत्पन्न हुँदा, जीवनरेखा प्रदान गर्दछ। युएई द्वारा प्रदान गरिएको मद्दत डब्ल्यूएचओलाई, जे आवश्यक छ, जहाँ र कहिले, विशेषज्ञ चिकित्सा मद्दत प्रदान गर्न, अग्रिममा यी स्वास्थ्य आपत्क प्रतिक्रियाहरूमा पुग्न मद्दत गर्दछ।

translations.source: As part of efforts to strengthen the global architecture for health emergency preparedness, response, and resilience the UAE, WHO, and partners are working hand-in-hand to deliver supplies to reach the world’s most vulnerable in their time of greatest need.” For his part, Dr Ahmed Al-Mandhari, WHO Regional Director for the Eastern Mediterranean, said, “The World Health Organization continues to coordinate with the Sudanese health authorities to deliver essential health supplies through all available pathways. Due to the conflict, hospitals, pharmacies and primary health care facilities have stocked out of essential, life-saving medicines. The arrival of an additional 30 metric tons of trauma and emergency surgery supplies as well as essential medicines will enable WHO to support 13 major health facilities and re-establish health care services for those in need. Our global logistics hub in Dubai plays a vital role in ensuring an uninterrupted supply of health commodities and we are grateful for the support provided by the United Arab Emirates to facilitate our first charter flight of these desperately needed supplies. It is support such as this that shows in action our Regional vision of health for all, by all.” The medical aid provided by the World Health Organization through the UAE accounted for approximately 55% of the total medical supplies provided to Sudan from abroad in 2022, reflecting the UAE's position as a major hub for international humanitarian assistance.
translations.reference: Njenge ngxenye yokuqinisa ezokwakha umhlaba kwezokulungiselela eziphuthumayo zempilo, ukuphendula nokubekezela Iuae, iWHO nokubambisana bayasebenzisana ukuhambisa amasaplayi ukufinyelela kwababuthaka kakhulu emhlabeni esikhathini sabo abadinga usizo ngayo. Ngengxenye yakhe, uDkt Ahmed Al-Mandhari, uMqondisi wesifunda seWHO wase-Eastern Mediterranean, uthe iNhlangano yeZempilo eMhlabeni izoqhubeka nokuxhumanisa nabasemagunyeni bezempilo eSudan ukuletha amasaplayi kulabo ababuthaka kakhulu emhlabeni esikhathi sokudinga usizo kakhulu. Ngenxa yokuxabana, izibhedlela, amakhemisi nezindawo zokunakekela ezempilo yokuqala seziphelelwe okubalulekile, okuyimithi yokusindisa izimpilo. Ukufika kwamathani amakhulu angeziwe awu-30 okukhathazeka namasaplayi ezokuhlinza okuphuthumayo kanye nemithi ebalulekile ukukwazi iWHO izokweseka izindawo zempilo ezinkulu ezingu-13 nokwenza kabusha kwezempilo umsebenzi wokunakekela kulabo abadingayo. Ilojistikhi yomhhlaba wethu kuhabhu yaseDubai idlala indawo ebaluleke kakhulu ukuqinisekisa ukungaphazamiseki kwesaplayi kwezempilo futhi siyajabula ukwesekwa esikunikiwe yi-United Arab Emirates ukusiza ishatha yokuqala bebhanoyi lalamasaplayi adingeka ngokushesha. Kungukweseka okunjalo njengoba lokhu kukhombisa ukwenza kombono wethu eSifundeni wezempilo kuwona wonke umuntu yiwona wonke umuntu. Usizo lwezokwelapha olunikezwe Inhlangano yezempilo emhlabeni nge-UAE kubalelwe kwafinyelela ku-55% isamba samasaplayi okwelapha anikezwe iSudan asuka phesheya ngo-2022, ukuveza isikhundla seUAE njengehabhu enkulu yosizo loluntu emazweni angaphandle.
translations.hypothesis: लगातार, स्वास्थ्यको आपत्कालीन तयारी, प्रतिक्रिया र लचीलापनलाई मement, संयुक्त अरब एमिरात (UAE), विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठन (WHO), र साझेदारहरू काम सम्Collaborate गरी, "यसले सुनिश्चित गर्ने लक्ष्य छ, वितरणको माध्यम, विश्वको सबैभन्दा कमजोर व्यक्तिहरूलाई, जब उनीहरूलाई धेरै आवश्यकता छ।" यसको सम्बन्धमा, डा. अहमद अल-मन्दाहरी, पूर्वी भूमध्यसागरीय क्षेत्रका WHO क्षेत्रीय निर्देशक, भन्छन्, "विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठनले लगातार सुडानका स्वास्थ्य अधिकारीहरूसँग समन्वय गरिरहेको छ, ताकि आवश्यक स्वास्थ्य सामग्रीहरू सबै उपलब्ध मार्गहरू मार्फत वितरण गरिन्छ। संघर्षको कारण, अस्पताल, औषधिदाल र प्राथमिक स्वास्थ्य सेवा केन्द्रहरूले आवश्यक, जीवन रक्षक औषधिकहरू समाप्त भएका छन्। थप 30 टन आघात र आपत्कालीन शल्य चिकित्सा सामग्री, साथै आवश्यक औषधिकहरूको आगमन, WHO लाई 13 मुख्य स्वास्थ्य केन्द्रहरूलाई मement र उनहरूलाई आवश्यक छ, स्वास्थ्य सेवापुनःसञ्चालन गर्न मement। हाम्रो विश्वव्यापी रसद केन्द्र, दुबई, एक महत्त्वपूर्ण भूमिका बजाउँछ, ताकि स्वास्थ्य सामग्रीहरूको लगातार वितरण सुनिश्चित गरिन्छ, र हामी संयुक्त अरब एमिरातले दिइएको समर्थनको लागि आभारी छ, ताकि हामी यस आवश्यक सामग्रीहरूको पहिलो चार्टर उडानलाई सुलभ बनाउन सकू। यस्तो समर्थनले, "स्वास्थ्यको लागि सबै, सबैले" हाम्रो क्षेत्रीय दृष्टिकोणलाई सचेत बनाउँछ। विश्व स्वास्थ्य संगठनले UAE मार्फत सुडानलाई दिइएको चिकित्सा मement, कुल चिकित्सा सामग्रीमध्ये लगभग 55% प्रतिनिधित्व गर्दछ, जे UAE लाई अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय मानवीय मementको प्रमुख केन्द्रको रूपमा देखाउँछ।

translations.source: Collaborating locally is key for progress globally towards health-related SDGs A new progress report is being jointly released today by the 13 signatory agencies of the Global Action Plan for Healthy Lives and Well-being for All (SDG3 GAP). The report entitled “What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?” reflects four years of joint work by major multilateral agencies outlining what has and has not worked in strengthening collaboration and support to accelerate country progress towards health-related Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). This year marks the halfway point toward the SDGs, but the world is lagging behind to reach the global goals. Since its launch in 2019, the SDG3 GAP enabled creation of new collaboration structures between the signatory agencies in key areas such as sustainable financing and primary health care among others. At least 67 countries engaged in on one or more of the SDG3 GAP accelerator themes. "We have made important progress, but we still have a long path to travel to improve the way that multilateral organizations work together to support countries. We must listen to what countries tell us and act upon their guidance,” said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General and Chair of the SDG3 GAP Principals Group. “I thank the partners for their collaboration and for the honest self-assessments contained in this report. "The report provides six key recommendations to ensure that countries benefit from a more streamlined support and to realize the commitments made in the SDG3 GAP.
translations.reference: Ukubambisana endaweni kubalulekile ekuqhubekeni emhlabeni okuya kokuhlobene nezempilo zamaSDG Umbiko wokuqhubeka omusha ukhishwe ngokuhlanganyela namhlanje kuma ejensi asayinile angu-13 eGlobal Action Plan for Helath Lives and Well being for All (SDG3 GAP). Umbiko usihloko esthi "What worked? What didn’t? What’s next?" uma kubhekwa iminyaka emine kusetshenzwa ndawonye ngama-ejensi ezindlela eziningi ezinkulu kuvezwa ukuthi yikuphi okusebenzile nokungasebenzanga ekuqinisweni ukubambisana nokwesekwa kwenqubeko yezwe okuuya nokuhlobene nezempilo zeSustainable Development Goals (amaSDG). Lo nyaka umaka iphuzu lahhafu eliya kumaSDG kodwa umhlaba usele ngemuva ukufika kuzinhloso zomhlaba. Kusukela ngokwethulwa kwayo ngo-2019, iSDG3 GAP yenze ukubambisana okusha kwezinhlaka phakathi kokusayina kwama ejensi ezindaweni ezibalulekile njengokugcineka kwezimali nokunakekelwa kwezempilo kokuqala kwabanye abantu. Okungenani amazwe angu-67 akhulumile kanye noma ngaphezulu ngeSDG3 GAP ukuqhuba izingqikithi. Senze inqubeko ebalulekile, kodwa kusanendlela ende okumele siyihambe ukwenza ngcono indlela izinhlangano eziningi ezisebenzisana ngayo ukweseka amazwe. Kumele silalele esikutshelwa ngamazwe futhi silandele imiyalelo,kusho uDkt Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, uMqondisi Jikelele weWHO noSihlalo weSDG3 GAP kuzinhloko zeqoqo. "Ngibonga ababambisani ngokubambisana kwazo nokuzihlola ngokwethembeka okuqukethwe kulombiko. "Umbiko unikeza iziphakamiso eziyisithupha ezibalulekile ukuqinisekisa ukuthi amazwe ayazuza ekwesekweni okukhishiwe nokubona ukuzibophezela okwenziwe kuSDG3 GAP.

translations.source: These include: continue the SDG3 GAP improvement cycle for health by seeking the views of Member States on how we collaborate at country-level and responding to related recommendations; maintain GAP as a platform for collaboration; foster stronger collaboration at the country level on primary health care and explore new thematic topics such as climate resilient health systems; jointly apply new approaches at country level such as the delivery for impact approach; engage more with civil society; and work with Member States to strengthen incentives for collaboration through political leadership, governance direction and funding to support collaboration. Key findings of the report will feed into discussions of the next United Nations General Assembly SDG Summit and the High-level Meeting on Universal Health Coverage in September 2023. The months leading up to these key events provide an opportunity for a joint push by Member States and multilateral agencies to identify ways on how to implement the recommendations and to prepare the ground to fully leverage stronger collaboration and accelerate progress towards the health-related SDGs in the second half of the SDG timeframe. Note to the editor:
translations.reference: Lokhu kufaka: Ukuqhubeka kokwenza ngcono kweSDG3 GAP kwezempilo ngokufuna imibono yeMember State ukuthi sibambisana kanjani ezingeni lezwe nokuphendula okuhlobene neziphakamiso; Ukugcina iGAP njengenkundla yokubambisana; ukulondoloza ukubambisana okuqinile ezingeni lezwe ekunakekelweni kwezempilo kokuqala nokubheka izindlela ezintsha njengesimo sezulu sokubekezela kuzinhlelo zempilo; Ngokuhlanganyela sebenzisa izindlela ezintsha ezingeni lezwe njengokuhambisa indlela yomthelela; ukukhuluma kakhulu nomphakathi; kanye nokusebenza neMember States ukuqinisa imiklomelo yokubambisana ngobuholi bezepolitiki,indlela yokubusa noxhasomali lokweseka ukubambisana. Imiphumela ebalulekile yombiko sizoyifaka ezingxoxweni kuUnited Nations General Assembly SDG Summit elandelayo nomhlangano wezinga eliphezulu kuUniversal Helath Coverage ngoMandulo 2023. Izinyanga eziholela kulezigameko ezibalulekile zinikeza ithuba ukuphusha ndawonye yiMember States kamaejensi ezindlela eziningi ukuhlonza izindlela ukuthi kuzokwenziwa kanjani iziphakamiso ukulungiselella indawo yesibambiso esiphelele ukuqina kokubambisana nokuqhuba inqubeko eya kokuhlobene nezempilo SDG kuhhafu wesibili weSDG wesikhathi esibekiwe. Inothi eliya kumhleli:
